name: wxcode-admin-estate-realty
title: Estate Realty Admin
description: Refined light-mode admin aesthetic: near-white canvas (#f7f9f9), deep teal sidebar (#0f2623), teal accent (#0d9488 / #14b8a6), 12px-radius white cards with teal shadow, and tabular Inter type. Archetype = 240px teal sidebar (entity switcher + grouped nav) + sticky 60px topbar (search + filter + avatar) + 4 KPI cards with sparklines + 60/40 grid (records table + ranked leaderboard) + full-width 5-stage horizontal pipeline, plus list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this refined light teal admin aesthetic to my domain — near-white canvas, teal sidebar with entity switcher, sticky topbar with search and filter, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, a 60/40 grid of records table and ranked leaderboard, a full-width horizontal pipeline, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个精致浅色 teal 风格应用到我的领域：近白底色、带实体切换器的 teal 侧边栏、带搜索和过滤器的顶栏、4 个带迷你折线图的 KPI 卡片、60/40 的记录表 + 排行榜网格、全宽水平管道，以及列表、表单和详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
